content.aboutParagraph: Mota Bhai brings the taste of Gujarat closer to Gujarati families living in Germany. From crispy namkeen to festive gifting, every product is selected to feel fresh, familiar, and worth sharing with family and friends.
content.aboutPromise: Simple ordering, honest pricing, premium packing, and the comfort of ghar jevo swaad - that is the Mota Bhai promise.
content.cartEmptyMessage: Your cart is waiting for something special.
content.collectionDescription: Choose your favourite catalog and explore fresh Gujarati snacks made for Germany.
content.emptyCatalogText: No products available in this catalog yet.
content.feature1Text: Handpicked snacks with authentic ghar jevo flavour.
content.feature2Text: Carefully packed for freshness, gifting, and safe delivery.
content.feature3Text: Select your items and send the order directly on WhatsApp.
content.heroSubheading: Fresh Gujarati nashta, premium packing, ane ghar jevo taste - specially Germany ma rehata Gujarati bhaiyo ane families mate.
content.trustLine: Fresh batches - Premium packing - WhatsApp ordering
